title: Yijing Hexagram 8: Bi (Holding Together)
description: Hexagram 8 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 8 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Holding Together brings good fortune. Inquire of the oracle once again. If you are eternal and steadfast, there is no blame.
